name: universal-brute-workpack
description: Universal Brute Workpack Codex wrapper for the npm MCP workpack.

interface.longDescription: Universal Brute Workpack adds a stdio-first MCP tool bundle for local files, CPU-parallel grep, commands, validation, memory fallback, audit runs, and Agent pipelines. This Codex wrapper points to the npm package and includes lightweight companion skills.
defaultPrompt: Use UBW to search files and summarize findings.
Use UBW to prepare an audit run.
Use UBW to review code and run checks.
